overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a lush wetland covered in lily pads, surrounded by dense forest. A distinctive red guiding wind effect flows across the scene as the camera cinematically orbits the character, transitioning from water to grassy terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow swamp with lily pad coverage

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking slowly through shallow water with lily pads, heading toward the distant tree line

entered.detail: shallow water surface densely covered with green lily pads and aquatic plants
dense line of green deciduous trees forming the swamp boundary
stylized red particle wind effect flowing horizontally across the scene
tall grass and reeds emerging from the water

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks through a sunlit swamp, with lily pads covering the water surface and a dense forest tree line in the distance. The iconic red guiding wind flows across the scene, directing the player forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy forest bank at swamp edge

events.description: character steps out of lily pad water onto grassy bank at the swamp's edge

agents.ego_description: samurai continuing forward onto grassy terrain, moving up the gentle slope away from the water

entered.detail: grass-covered slope rising from the water's edge with scattered rocks

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from water to grassy bank as the camera orbits to the right side. The red wind continues flowing while the dense forest trees become more prominent on the right side of the frame.

events.description: camera tilts upward and lowers to show tree canopy against blue sky while orbiting character

agents.ego_description: samurai walking uphill through grass as camera circles to a low angle looking up at the tree canopy

entered.detail: dense green leaves forming thick canopy overhead against bright blue sky

segments.scene_description: The camera moves to a low angle looking up at the samurai and the dense tree canopy above. The character walks through lush grass with tall trees surrounding the area, and the red wind effect fades from view as the camera focuses upward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sunlit, water-filled swamp into the depths of a dense forest. It begins with the samurai wading through a swamp covered in lily pads, guided by a flowing red wind that sweeps across the water toward a distant tree line. As the character moves from the water onto a grassy bank, the camera orbits to the right, bringing the towering forest trees into sharper prominence. The scene then shifts to a low angle looking upward, following the samurai through lush grass as the red wind fades from view. Finally, the camera focuses on the dense canopy of tall trees that closes in around the character.
